def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) for consistency
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # Compute the numerator: rank(vwap - close) cross-sectionally
    numerator = rank(pl.col('vwap') - pl.col('close')).over('date')
    
    # Compute the denominator: rank(vwap + close) cross-sectionally
    denominator = rank(pl.col('vwap') + pl.col('close')).over('date')
    
    # Divide numerator by denominator
    factor = numerator / denominator
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
